posts.author: Arockiya_Raja
posts.text: Improved UI in Basket orders — After you click the execute option on Basket, Kite places orders in the same sequence as in your basket. Orders will be placed in the same sequence; it will not check the previous orders’ execution status.

posts.author: bharat1080
posts.text: Improved UI in Basket orders — IMG_5121 1290×2796 165 KB If I place this basket order. The sell order will not placed until buy order is executed. Right ?

posts.author: nithin_kumrr
posts.text: Improved UI in Basket orders — Hi @sn88 , we’ve noted and shared your feedback with the team. Thanks.

posts.author: sn88
posts.text: Improved UI in Basket orders — Hello @Arockiya_Raja / @siva , On the kite option chain , can we add an icon for basket added , similar to → “p” for positions once an order is successfully placed. Also ATO for baskets would be very useful.
